ai.title: 特朗普解除联邦选举援助委员会剩余三名成员职务
ai.summary: 美国前总统特朗普解除联邦选举援助委员会剩余三名成员职务，导致该两党合作机构功能受损。
body_paragraphs: 据报道，特朗普已罢免了联邦选举援助委员会中剩余的三名成员。
此举使该委员会在即将到来的中期选举前陷入瘫痪状态，影响其作为两党合作机构的正常运作。

post.text: Trump ousts the three remaining members of a federal election assistance panel, crippling the bipartisan agency ahead of the midterms. https://t.co/ieZXWrxlOy

urls.description: The dismissals hamstring a key bipartisan agency just months before the midterms.
urls.title: Trump ousts remaining members of the Election Assistance Commission ahead of midterms
